falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top pattern would invalidate the current bottom pattern match and HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5500 (key resistance level) on 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A bullish breakout would contradict the bottom pattern and prove the HOLD signal incorrect

falsification_conditions.condition: Federal Reserve announces a 50bps rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Unexpected monetary stimulus would create market dynamics inconsistent with the current pattern and HOLD signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
